subcodes.first_line: O servant in attendance! Thou hast made mention of his honor Javád, upon him be the glory of God, from amongst the missives sent by the Afnán, upon him be God's glory and favor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد حاضر ذکر نمودی جناب جواد علیه بهائی از اوراق مرسلۀ افنان علیه بهائی و عنایتی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
